mapper.select:
select sppi.sys_id , sppi.plant_cd , sp2.plant_nm , sppi.payment_cd , sp.payment_nm , sppi.last_checkout_date , sppi.estimate_checkout_date from sys_plant_pay_info sppi left join sys_payment sp on sp.payment_cd = sppi.payment_cd left join sys_plant sp2 on sp2.plant_cd = sp.plant_cd where 1=1
and ( sppi.plant_cd like concat('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%') or sp2.plant_nm like concat('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%') or sppi.payment_cd like concat('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%') or sp.payment_nm like concat('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%') )
and sp.delete_yn = 'N' and sp2.delete_yn = 'N' order by sppi.plant_cd asc
